productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kangaroo Green White Infant Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, with light green buttons, light green stitch detailing, two patch pockets on the front and has button closuresFittingRegular98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge your little on in the spirit of spring in this light green and white checked shirt from gini and jony. Team this with a pair of white shorts and crocs footwear when you take him out next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
